Interface IInterpolateIrregularDataFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control InterpolateIrregularData function arguments.

[Guid("C9C09B1E-BE49-49D6-AE88-0A2EE969D21E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IInterpolateIrregularDataFunctionArguments

Properties

InterpolationMethod

The interpolation method.

esriInterpolateIrregularDataMethod InterpolationMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriInterpolateIrregularDataMethod

Examples

Sample Snippet

PointFeatureClass

The points in a table.

object PointFeatureClass { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Radius

The search radius for points.

double Radius { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterInfo

The raster definition containing at least extent, cellsize, and pixel type.

IRasterInfo RasterInfo { get; set; }

Property Value

IRasterInfo

ValueField

The value (Z) field name.

string ValueField { get; set; }
